prestazioni: Full bolt-on N55B30T0 (3.0L inline-6) Stage 2+ tune via MHD Flasher with custom DME map by Eurocharged, targeting 550whp/520wtq on E85 blend (60% mix) with upgraded inlets, chargepipe, and 7641-9003560 BorgWarner EFR 8374 turbo (0.92 A/R, 62mm inducer, 83mm exducer) running 28psi peak boost on stock internals with reinforced rod bolts (ARP 2000) and upgraded oil pump drive chain (Genuine BMW 11-31-7-615-328)

Full cooling system overhaul with CSF Racing 7-row aluminum radiator (CSF-7005), Genuine BMW N55 oil cooler (17-25-7-615-629), and PWR Performance intercooler (PWR-BMW-M2-F87) with 40% increased core volume, paired with a Davies Craig EWP150 electric water pump and Mishimoto silicone hoses (MMHOSE-BMW-M2-15BLK) for sustained track use

Drivetrain reinforcement with M2-specific OS Giken Super Lock LSD (OS G12-2WLSD) with 45% preload, upgraded M2 Competition clutch (SACHS Performance 3000951634) with cerametallic disc, and Genuine BMW M2 CS driveshaft (33-21-7-618-340) with upgraded CV joints (GKN Lobro 3074020100) to handle increased torque
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Pandem F87 widebody kit (RB-WB-BMW-M2-F87) with carbon fiber fenders, overfenders, and front/rear bumpers, paired with custom 3M Matte Military Green (3M-1934) wrap with satin clear coat by Avery Dennison

OEM+ M2 CS front lip (51-11-2-473-983) with custom carbon fiber canards (Seibon CF-BMW-M2-F87-CANARD) and M Performance carbon fiber rear diffuser (51-71-2-473-984) with integrated titanium exhaust tips (Akrapovic 1472-1705T) for the M Performance titanium exhaust system (76-12-9-403-535)

Custom interior with full Alcantara retrim by Status Gruppe (SG-BMW-M2-F87-INT), including M2 CS steering wheel (32-70-2-473-985) with red stitching, Recaro Pole Position seats (RECARO-PP9-EVO-F87) in black Alcantara with red leather bolsters, and custom roll cage (Status Gruppe SG-CAGE-M2-F87) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360 4L)
